productDisplayName: Doodle Girl Little frock Pink Tops
description: Composition Pink frock made of 100% Cotton, with tie-up bows at the shoulders, lace styling on the front, pleated panels at the hem and brand badge on the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print The cute statement simply zooms high when you dress your little girl in this pink frock from doodle. Team this with lacy shoes and make her the fairy that she is.
